title: Caregiver - Auto-Populate Existing PwD Details - Functional Test Plan
overview: Comprehensive functional testing of the Auto-Populate Existing PwD Details feature on the AT/AD platform. When a PwD is found in SwarajAbility via Aadhaar lookup (SCRUM-366), their details are auto-filled for the caregiver to review and confirm linkage. Covers auto-population of PwD fields (Name, Date of Birth, Gender, Disability Type, Aadhaar), read-only/non-editable verified fields, confirmation to link PwD to caregiver profile, and edge cases including data fetch timeout with retry and PwD already linked to another caregiver.

inScope: Auto-population of PwD details from SwarajAbility (Name, DOB, Gender, Disability Type, Aadhaar)
All fetched fields displayed as shown in Figma design
Confirmation action to link PwD to caregiver profile
Data fetch timeout with retry option
PwD already linked to other caregivers blocked
outOfScope: Aadhaar lookup and OTP verification (covered in SCRUM-366)
New PwD registration flow (covered in SCRUM-372)

testCases.title: Verify PwD details are auto-populated from SwarajAbility after successful Aadhaar lookup
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is logged in; Aadhaar lookup (SCRUM-366) completed successfully; PwD found in SwarajAbility; OTP verified
steps: 1. Complete Aadhaar lookup and OTP verification for an existing PwD
2. Verify the auto-populate page/section loads after OTP verification
3. Verify PwD Name is auto-filled and displayed
4. Verify Date of Birth is auto-filled and displayed
5. Verify Gender is auto-filled and displayed
6. Verify Disability Type is auto-filled and displayed
7. Verify Aadhaar number is displayed (read-only)
8. Verify all displayed fields match the PwD's SwarajAbility profile data
9. Verify the layout matches the Figma design specification
expectedResults: Auto-populate page loads after successful OTP verification
PwD Name is correctly auto-filled from SwarajAbility
Date of Birth is correctly auto-filled
Gender is correctly auto-filled
Disability Type is correctly auto-filled
Aadhaar is displayed in read-only format
All fields match the PwD's SwarajAbility profile
Layout matches Figma design
testCases.postconditions: PwD details are displayed for caregiver review

testCases.title: Verify all auto-populated fields are non-editable (read-only)
testCases.preconditions: PwD details are auto-populated on screen after successful Aadhaar lookup
steps: 1. Verify PwD Name field is non-editable (click on it, try typing)
2. Verify Date of Birth field is non-editable
3. Verify Gender field is non-editable (cannot change selection)
4. Verify Disability Type field is non-editable
5. Verify Aadhaar field is non-editable and read-only
6. Attempt to modify each field using keyboard input
7. Attempt to modify fields via browser developer tools (inspect element)
8. Verify no field accepts user input or modification
expectedResults: Name field does not accept keyboard input or modification
Date of Birth field does not accept changes
Gender field cannot be changed (dropdown disabled or no interaction)
Disability Type field cannot be changed
Aadhaar field is explicitly read-only
All verified fields are visually indicated as non-editable (greyed out, locked icon, or similar)
No field modification is possible through normal user interaction
testCases.postconditions: All auto-populated fields confirmed as non-editable

testCases.title: Verify confirmation action links PwD to caregiver profile
testCases.preconditions: PwD details are auto-populated and displayed; Caregiver has reviewed the details
steps: 1. Review all auto-populated PwD details on screen
2. Locate the confirmation button (e.g., 'Confirm & Link PwD', 'Add PwD')
3. Click the confirmation button
4. Verify a success message is displayed
5. Verify the PwD is now linked to the caregiver's profile
6. Navigate to My PwDs page
7. Verify the newly linked PwD appears in the PwD list
8. Verify the PwD card shows correct name, disability type, and date added
9. Verify PwD count and remaining slots are updated
expectedResults: Confirmation button is visible and clickable
Clicking confirmation triggers PwD linking
Success message is displayed (e.g., 'PwD successfully linked to your profile')
PwD appears in My PwDs list with correct details
PwD count increases by 1
Remaining slots decrease by 1
testCases.postconditions: PwD is linked to caregiver profile; Visible in My PwDs dashboard

testCases.title: Verify Aadhaar is displayed as read-only with masking
testCases.preconditions: PwD details are auto-populated after successful Aadhaar lookup
steps: 1. Locate the Aadhaar field in the auto-populated details
2. Verify Aadhaar number is displayed
3. Verify Aadhaar is masked for privacy (e.g., XXXX-XXXX-0123)
4. Verify the field is explicitly marked as read-only
5. Attempt to click on the Aadhaar field
6. Verify no cursor or edit mode is activated
7. Attempt to copy the Aadhaar value (if applicable)
expectedResults: Aadhaar is displayed on the auto-populate page
Aadhaar is masked for privacy (only last 4 digits visible or similar)
Field is clearly marked as read-only
No edit mode is activated on click
Aadhaar privacy is maintained

testCases.title: Verify all fields displayed match Figma design specification
testCases.preconditions: PwD details are auto-populated; Figma design is available for reference
steps: 1. Open the auto-populate page with PwD details
2. Compare field labels with Figma design
3. Verify field order matches design
4. Verify typography (font size, weight) matches design
5. Verify spacing and padding between fields matches design
6. Verify read-only visual indicators match design (greyed out, borders, icons)
7. Verify confirmation button styling matches design
8. Verify overall page layout matches Figma
expectedResults: All field labels match Figma design
Field order is consistent with design
Typography and spacing match design specification
Read-only indicators are as designed
Confirmation button styling matches design
Overall layout is consistent with Figma

testCases.title: Verify data fetch timeout shows retry option
testCases.preconditions: Aadhaar lookup succeeded; OTP verified; SwarajAbility data fetch is slow or times out
steps: 1. Complete Aadhaar lookup and OTP verification
2. Simulate or wait for data fetch timeout from SwarajAbility
3. Verify a timeout/error message is displayed
4. Verify a retry option is provided (button or link)
5. Click the retry option
6. Verify the system retries fetching PwD details
7. If retry succeeds, verify details are auto-populated correctly
8. Verify no partial or corrupted data is displayed on timeout
expectedResults: Timeout is detected and handled gracefully
Clear message displayed (e.g., 'Unable to fetch details. Please try again.')
Retry option is visible and functional
Retry fetches data successfully when service is available
No partial or corrupted data is shown during timeout
No unhandled errors or blank screens
testCases.postconditions: Data fetch timeout handling is verified

testCases.title: Verify PwD already linked to another caregiver is blocked
testCases.preconditions: PwD's Aadhaar is found in SwarajAbility; PwD is already linked to a different caregiver
steps: 1. Complete Aadhaar lookup for a PwD already linked to another caregiver
2. Complete OTP verification
3. Verify the system detects the PwD is already linked
4. Verify an error/block message is displayed
5. Verify the message provides guidance (e.g., 'Contact support')
6. Verify the confirmation/link button is NOT available
7. Verify no PwD data is added to the current caregiver's profile
8. Verify the caregiver can navigate back
expectedResults: System detects PwD is already linked to another caregiver
Block message is displayed clearly
Guidance is provided (support contact or help link)
Confirmation/link button is disabled or hidden
No PwD is added to current caregiver's profile
Back navigation is available

testCases.title: Verify caregiver can cancel/go back without linking the PwD
testCases.preconditions: PwD details are auto-populated on screen
steps: 1. Review auto-populated PwD details
2. Locate the back/cancel button
3. Click back/cancel without confirming
4. Verify user is navigated back to previous page (Aadhaar lookup or My PwDs)
5. Verify the PwD is NOT linked to the caregiver's profile
6. Navigate to My PwDs page
7. Verify the PwD does not appear in the list
8. Verify PwD count has not changed
expectedResults: Back/cancel button is visible and functional
Clicking back navigates away without linking
PwD is NOT added to caregiver's profile
My PwDs list does not include the PwD
PwD count remains unchanged
testCases.postconditions: Cancel/back navigation without linking is verified

testCases.title: Verify auto-populated details handle PwD with minimal data from SwarajAbility
testCases.preconditions: PwD exists in SwarajAbility with only mandatory fields (some optional fields may be empty)
steps: 1. Complete Aadhaar lookup for a PwD with minimal data in SwarajAbility
2. Verify auto-populate page loads without errors
3. Verify available fields (Name, Aadhaar) are populated
4. Verify missing optional fields show appropriate placeholders or are hidden
5. Verify the page layout is not broken by missing data
6. Verify confirmation button is still functional
7. Click confirm and verify PwD is linked successfully
expectedResults: Page loads without errors despite missing optional data
Available fields are correctly populated
Missing fields show placeholders or are gracefully hidden
Page layout remains intact
Confirmation still works and PwD is linked

testCases.title: Verify duplicate confirmation attempt is blocked (prevent double-linking)
testCases.preconditions: PwD details are auto-populated; Confirmation button is visible
steps: 1. Review auto-populated PwD details
2. Click the confirmation button
3. Immediately click the confirmation button again (double-click)
4. Verify only one linking action is processed
5. Verify no duplicate PwD entry is created in caregiver's profile
6. Navigate to My PwDs page
7. Verify the PwD appears only once
expectedResults: Confirmation button is disabled after first click
Only one linking request is processed
No duplicate PwD entry in caregiver's profile
PwD appears exactly once in My PwDs list

AC1_pwd_details_fetched.description: PwD details fetched from SwarajAbility: Name, DOB, Gender, Disability Type, Aadhaar (read-only)

AC2_fields_as_per_figma.description: All fields as shown in Figma design

AC4_confirmation_links_pwd.description: Confirmation links PwD to caregiver profile

EC2_already_linked.description: PwD already linked to other caregivers → blocked

pwd_profiles_in_swarajability.name: Rajesh Kumar
pwd_profiles_in_swarajability.status: Registered, not linked to any caregiver

caregiver_account.status: Registered, logged in, with available PwD slots

assumptions: Aadhaar lookup (SCRUM-366) and OTP verification are functional
SwarajAbility API returns PwD details correctly
Figma design for auto-populate page is finalized
Caregiver has available PwD slots for linking
Test PwD profiles exist in SwarajAbility with varying data completeness
dependencies: SCRUM-366: Aadhaar-based PwD lookup must be functional (prerequisite flow)
SCRUM-363: My PwDs page must be functional for verifying linked PwD
SCRUM-375: PwD limit enforcement must be active
SwarajAbility API must be operational for data fetch

open_questions_and_clarifications.question: What is the exact timeout duration for SwarajAbility data fetch?
Are there additional fields beyond Name, DOB, Gender, Disability Type, and Aadhaar shown in Figma?
open_questions_and_clarifications.impact: Affects TC_AUTO_POP_001 and TC_AUTO_POP_005 field verification

open_questions_and_clarifications.question: What happens if the PwD is already linked to the SAME caregiver (re-linking attempt)?
open_questions_and_clarifications.impact: Not covered in current ACs; may need additional test case

open_questions_and_clarifications.question: Is there a loading indicator while PwD details are being fetched from SwarajAbility?
open_questions_and_clarifications.impact: Affects user experience verification during data fetch

priority_order: Highest tests (TC_AUTO_POP_001-003) should be executed first - core auto-population, read-only, and confirmation
High priority tests (004-008) cover Aadhaar display, Figma compliance, timeout retry, already linked, and cancel navigation
Medium priority tests (009-010) cover minimal data handling and double-linking prevention

estimated_effort.critical_path: 3-5 hours for critical path testing only

test_environment_requirements: QA environment with AT/AD platform accessible
SwarajAbility API operational with test PwD profiles
Aadhaar lookup and OTP verification functional (SCRUM-366)
Caregiver account with available PwD slots
Figma design access for UI comparison

metadata.coverage: 100% of acceptance criteria and all edge cases covered
